		<style id="wp-custom-css">
			/* Import Google Fonts: Anybody & Bebas Neue */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anybody:wght@400;600&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap');

/* --------------------
   Form Box Style
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form.login,
.woocommerce form.register {
    background: #f9fcff;
    border: 1px solid #002866;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 25px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
}

/* --------------------
   Labels
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form.login label,
.woocommerce form.register label {
    color: #002866;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: bold;
    /* letter-spacing removed */
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
}

/* --------------------
   Input Fields
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form.login input.input-text,
.woocommerce form.register input.input-text {
    width: 100%;
    border: 1px solid #002866;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    transition: 0.3s ease;
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
}

.woocommerce form.login input.input-text:focus,
.woocommerce form.register input.input-text:focus {
    border-color: #002866;
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(0,40,102,0.3);
}

/* --------------------
   Buttons (Login / Register)
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form.login button,
.woocommerce form.register button {
    background: #002866;
    color: #fff !important;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 12px 25px;
    font-size: 16px;                  /* button size */
    font-weight: normal;              /* not bold */
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; /* button font */
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: 0.3s ease;
}

.woocommerce form.login button:hover,
.woocommerce form.register button:hover {
    background: #0044cc;
}

/* --------------------
   Links
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form.login a,
.woocommerce form.register a {
    color: #002866;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
}

.woocommerce form.login a:hover,
.woocommerce form.register a:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
}

/* --------------------
   Required Stars
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form .required {
    color: red !important;
}

/* --------------------
   Register Form Description
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form.register p {
    color: #2a2a2a;                 /* new color */
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
    font-size: 16px;                /* new size */
    line-height: 1.6;
    letter-spacing: normal;         /* spacing removed */
}

/* --------------------
   Password Eye Button
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form .show-password-input {
    background-color: #002866;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: 0.3s ease;
}

.woocommerce form .show-password-input:after {
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 16px;
}

.woocommerce form .show-password-input:hover {
    background-color: #0044cc;
}

/* Password Input ke andar Eye Button fix */
.woocommerce form .password-input {
    position: relative; /* eye button ko input ke andar place karne ke liye */
}

.woocommerce form .show-password-input {
    position: absolute;
    right: 10px;         /* input ke right side par */
    top: 40%;            /* perfect center */
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: transparent !important; /* background hatao */
    padding: 0 !important;
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.woocommerce form .show-password-input:after {
    color: #002866;     /* eye icon color */
    font-size: 18px;
}

/* --------------------
   User Input Text & Placeholder
-------------------- */
.woocommerce form input[type="text"],
.woocommerce form input[type="email"],
.woocommerce form input[type="password"],
.woocommerce form input[type="tel"],
.woocommerce form input[type="number"],
.woocommerce form textarea {
    color: #002866 !important;   /* user ka text color */
    font-size: 16px;
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
}

.woocommerce form input::placeholder,
.woocommerce form textarea::placeholder {
    color: #888 !important;      /* placeholder ka color */
    font-style: italic;
}



/* Checkout headings (Shipping options, Payment options) */
.woocommerce-checkout h3 {
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
    color: #002866;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: bold;
}

/* Labels aur shipping/payment methods (Free Shipping, PayPal, Credit Card etc.) */
.woocommerce-checkout label,
.woocommerce-checkout .woocommerce-shipping-methods li,
.woocommerce-checkout .wc_payment_method label {
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
    color: #002866;
    font-size: 18px;
}

/* Privacy Policy, Return to Cart, links */
.woocommerce-checkout .woocommerce-privacy-policy-text,
.woocommerce-checkout a {
    font-family: 'alata', sans-serif;
    color: #002866;
    font-size: 18px;
}

/* Proceed to PayPal button */
.woocommerce-checkout #place_order,
.woocommerce-checkout .button.alt {
    font-family: 'Anybody', sans-serif;
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #fff;
    background-color: #002866;
}

/* Proceed to PayPal button style */
.wc-block-components-checkout-place-order-button {
    background-color: #002866 !important;  /* Dark Blue */
    color: #ffffff !important;            /* White text */
    font-size: 25px !important;
	  letter-spacing 5px !important:
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    padding: 14px 40px !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    border: none !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
}

/* Hover effect */
.wc-block-components-checkout-place-order-button:hover {
    background-color: #0044cc !important; /* Lighter blue */
    transform: scale(1.05) !important;
}		</style>

                    <div id="Collapse-886c42d69b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-1-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Common claims include antioxidation, reduced inflammation, improved recovery, energy boost, metabolic support, cognitive and skin benefits.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-2-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-b118d6769b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-b118d6769b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-b118d6769b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">Is hydrogen water safe to drink every day?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-b118d6769b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-2-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Yes—studies and expert opinions indicate it’s generally safe, even in high concentrations, and naturally produced by gut bacteria.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-3-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-f55d34769b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-f55d34769b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-f55d34769b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">How long does hydrogen stay dissolved in the bottle?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-f55d34769b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-3-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Hydrogen begins to dissipate quickly—best to drink within 20–30 minutes of generation for maximum benefits.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-4-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-46980ad69b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-46980ad69b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-46980ad69b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">How do I use and care for my hydrogen water bottle?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-46980ad69b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-4-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Use filtered or purified water; avoid distilled or mineral-heavy water; clean regularly (e.g., citric acid soak); store properly.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-5-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-1f2506a69b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-1f2506a69b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-1f2506a69b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">What materials and certifications should a quality bottle have?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-1f2506a69b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-5-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Look for BPA-free, PFAS-free, food-grade materials, and third-party lab certifications (e.g., PEM/SPE electrolysis)</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-6-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-629708369b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-629708369b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-629708369b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">Can I put hydrogen water in the refrigerator or another container?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-629708369b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-6-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Yes—if the container is hermetically sealed (especially glass), but hydrogen still dissipates over time.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-7-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-100c67f69b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-100c67f69b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-100c67f69b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">How much hydrogen water should I drink per day?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-100c67f69b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-7-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Recommended intake ranges from 1–3 liters; some brands suggest up to 1.5 liters for therapeutic benefit.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-8-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-f7b613c69b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-f7b613c69b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-f7b613c69b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">Are there any side effects or interactions?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-f7b613c69b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-8-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>Generally none, but if you’re pregnant, nursing, or have chronic health conditions, consult your healthcare provider.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

                
                <div class="elementskit-card ">
                    <div class="elementskit-card-header" id="primaryHeading-9-e6078a2">
                        <a href="#collapse-839492769b71cc86ac65" class="ekit-accordion--toggler elementskit-btn-link collapsed" data-ekit-toggle="collapse" data-target="#Collapse-839492769b71cc86ac65" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="Collapse-839492769b71cc86ac65">
                            
                            <span class="ekit-accordion-title">What does science actually say? Are the benefits proven?</span>

                            
                                <div class="ekit_accordion_icon_group">
                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_normal_icon">
                                        <!-- Normal Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-down-arrow1"></i>                                    </div>

                                    <div class="ekit_accordion_active_icon">
                                        <!-- Active Icon -->
										<i class="icon icon-up-arrow"></i>                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            
                                                    </a>
                    </div>

                    <div id="Collapse-839492769b71cc86ac65" class=" collapse" aria-labelledby="primaryHeading-9-e6078a2" data-parent="#accordion-69b71cc86ac65">

                        <div class="elementskit-card-body ekit-accordion--content">
                            <p>While early studies (mostly small or animal trials) show promise, larger clinical trials are still needed to confirm efficacy.</p>                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div><!-- .elementskit-card END -->

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
